startingCommit: 8a2dde1 Fix libadwaita style warning and focus cleanup
goal: Add Dashboard and sidebar navigation to a read-only Config page that introduces future config selection, connected-file review, profiles, and write-target selection without activating those behaviors.
uiChanges: Added a synthetic Config sidebar item after Dashboard.
Added a Dashboard Config card with an Open button.
Added a read-only Config page separate from the settings list/detail view.
Kept normal settings categories on the existing list/detail layout.

dashboardChanges.cardCopy: Choose which Hyprland config the app reviews and where future changes should be saved.
dashboardChanges.navigation: Open selects the Config sidebar item.

configPageSections.title: Config file
configPageSections.purpose: Show which config path is currently detected or why it is unavailable.

configPageSections.title: Connected files
configPageSections.purpose: Explain that connected-file review is planned and not active yet.

configPageSections.title: Profiles
configPageSections.purpose: Explain that profile switching is planned and not active yet.

configPageSections.title: Future changes
configPageSections.purpose: Explain that future writes will ask where to save when a setting is controlled in more than one place.

copyAdded: Auto-detection is a starting point. You will be able to choose another config file before the app writes changes.
This setup may use more than one config file.
Connected-file review is planned and not active yet.
The app will review connected files before allowing changes.
Profile switching is not active yet.
Future versions may show desktop, gaming, theme, or host profiles here.
When a setting is controlled in more than one place, the app will ask where to save the change before applying it.
The app will back up the file before saving changes.

validation.gitStatusShort: passed with unrelated local-only audit/design artifacts still untracked

proofUsed: Source inspection of existing Dashboard/sidebar routing in src/ui/window.rs.
Source inspection of current config discovery and UI projection model.
New source-level tests proving Config card/sidebar/page wiring and disabled future controls.
Existing final coverage tests preserving 341 readable / 341 writable / 0 blocked.
proofStillMissing: No real GTK file picker behavior is implemented yet.
No profile switching behavior is implemented yet.
No source/include graph review behavior is implemented yet.
No layered write-target selection behavior is implemented yet.
nextRecommendedSprint: Implement read-only source/include-aware config detection with fixture tests, then wire its summary into the Config page.
